intro: This archive contains eight articles from April 10 to April 17, 2026, detailing security events affecting macOS systems. The reporting covers five high-severity and two medium-severity incidents. The threat actors ClickFix, Lazarus Group, and Sapphire Sleet were prominently observed in this period. Their activities primarily targeted the cryptocurrency, technology, and artificial-intelligence sectors. The impact of these threats was noted as global in scope, underscoring the widespread nature of the attacks documented across these reports.
